roles.title: U.S. Talent Investor, Senior Associate
roles.description: Support founders throughout their journey from initial meeting to exit. Identify exceptional individuals, advise founders on cofounder formation and idea development, and facilitate fundraising with founders during LAUNCH phase in San Francisco.

roles.title: Paris Talent Investor, Senior Associate
roles.description: Talent Investor role supporting founders across B2B, consumer, and deeptech sectors. Identify exceptional individuals, advise on cofounder matching and idea development, and build investor networks.

roles.title: London Talent Investor, Analyst
roles.description: Entry-level Talent Investor role supporting founders from initial engagement through development. Identify exceptional individuals and advise on cofounder formation and company building.
